key_points.text: NVIDIA management directly addressed export-restriction concerns, reaffirming that China data-center exposure is limited and already largely de-risked, with proposed measures not expected to materially affect outlook or guidance.

citation.quote: NVIDIA pushed back hard on the day's report of potential U.S. export restrictions, telling investors its China data-center exposure is limited and already largely de-risked and that the proposed measures would not materially affect its outlook or guidance.

key_points.text: NVIDIA unveiled a next-generation inference platform with marquee customers committing to early adoption, which analysts said reinforces the company's data-center competitive moat and broadens demand beyond model training.

citation.quote: the company unveiled a next-generation inference platform, with several marquee customers committing to early adoption, a launch analysts said reinforces NVIDIA's data-center moat and broadens demand well beyond model training.

key_points.text: The update reversed earlier export-control concerns and refocused the market on accelerating AI infrastructure demand, with the bullish thesis firmly intact.

citation.quote: The update reversed the earlier concern and refocused the market on accelerating AI infrastructure demand; the bullish thesis is firmly intact.
